CCW also obtains Medicare payment risk score data files from CMS. From this source data, the CCW team has 
prepared data files to disseminate to researchers approved under a Data Use Agreement (DUA) to obtain Medicare 
administrative data for research purposes. The CCW Medicare data contain identifiable information and are subject to 
the Privacy Act and other federal government rules and regulations (refer to the Research Data Assistance Center
